title.en: In the silent sea, corpses floated on it.

content.en:
In the silent sea, corpses floated on it.

There are the corpses of the Supreme, there are also the corpses of the half-step Eternal Realm, and even the corpses of some invincible people.

"Strange, where did so many corpses come from?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

It's not that he hasn't been to the Sea of Silence, he's been here before, but there's nothing in the Sea of Silence.

In the past, there were indeed many supreme beings and even half-step Eternal Realm who had fallen in the Sea of Silence, but after these powerhouses fell, they quickly disappeared.

This is also a secret of the Sea of Silence, and no one knows why.

But now, the corpses of these strong men have emerged.

Suddenly, Ye Tian felt the strangeness of the Sea of Silence, and there seemed to be some special changes here.

He didn't think too much about it, but put away the void balls of these strong people as soon as possible.

The accumulation of the resources of these strong people is also a large number, although there may not be many resources useful to him, but it is not bad to leave so many resources for the human race.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to collect all of these powerhouses' void balls.

As for the bodies of these strong men, he sent them out to be buried in a treasure place.

......

"I'm afraid something has gone wrong with the Sea of Silence, and the Void Source Hall can't stay here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And for him, the Sea of Silence was not a forbidden place at all, and the same was true for those powerful extreme realms.

Therefore, there was no need for the Void Source Hall to stay in the Sea of Silence, and it could be directly brought back to the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Wow!

The huge Void Source Hall entered Ye Tian's body, and Ye Tian flew out of the Sea of Silence and quickly returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

After placing the Void Source Hall in the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian's copy body came to the Sea of Silence again, paying attention to the changes in the Sea of Silence at all times.

As time passed, the void of the Sea of Silence became more and more turbulent, and the turmoil came from the deeper void.

And at the beginning, after those strong people fell in the Sea of Silence, they were swallowed up by the unknown void, and now that the void is turbulent, these corpses have reappeared.

However, before the changes in the Sea of Silence were completely over, it would be difficult for Ye Tian to do anything.

He tried to move along the Void into the unknown Void, only to be stopped by an unknown force, making it impossible for him to enter at all.

He has already reached the level of a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse in the Five Extremes Realm, and this force can easily stop him, but it is conceivable that if there is an opportunity here, I am afraid it will be very remarkable.

"The opportunity that those Eternal Realm Lords are looking for once in a hundred thousand eternal years won't be right here, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If this is the case, the Sea of Silence will become a battlefield!

Fortunately, the Dark Forbidden Realm is relatively far away from the Sea of Silence, and if it is close, the slightest fluctuation in the battle in the Eternal Realm will cause an Eternal Heaven and Earth to collapse.

In the blink of an eye, another catastrophic year has passed.

The void turmoil of the Sea of Silence is getting farther and farther away, and even the Sea of Silence has been transmitted, but since there are no living creatures nearby, the news has not yet spread.

But Ye Tian knew very well that this place would eventually be discovered.

this day.

The Sea of Silence had reached a certain limit of change, and countless golden rays of light enveloped the entire Sea of Silence, even the territory around the Sea of Silence.

Ye Tian saw a golden tree from the golden light, this golden tree didn't seem to be very big, but its light even crushed time and space, suppressed everything, as if it was the source of everything, and as if it was the essence of everything.

Around the golden tree, there was an endless earth, but because the distance was too far, and the surrounding scenery did not have such a powerful aura as the golden tree, it could not be projected, and Ye Tian couldn't see it clearly.

"This is definitely a chance that is born only once in 100,000 eternal years!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and rushed directly to the depths of the unknown void.

Maybe the Eternal Realm will come soon, but if he doesn't give it a go, it will be enough to regret it for the rest of his life.

This time, the unknown force did not hinder Ye Tian.

Ye Tian went deep into that unknown void along a golden avenue, and soon arrived at that location void.

And at this moment, a strange force attacked, several times more powerful than the strange power of the Silent Sea.

Ye Tian ignored this power, stepped out of the golden avenue, and stepped on a piece of land.

Vaguely, he saw golden trees in a distant land, but far away.

Moreover, the strange forces here have been influencing him.

In addition, the suppression here is terrifying, so it will take a little time for Ye Tian to reach the Golden Tree.

Wow!

Ye Tian moved quickly, wanting to reach the Golden Tree as soon as possible.

But soon, his expression changed.

"How so?"

Every little distance he moved, the impact of the strange force became stronger.

"I'm afraid I won't be able to get to the Golden Tree!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But after advancing for a distance, Ye Tian was not worried.

Because he found a treasure.

"This is the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass is an incomparably precious resource in the Source Sea, even for the half-step Eternal Realm, he can increase the strength of his body, improve his cultivation, and can also improve his eternal body.

If someone's Eternal Body has not reached the Perfection Realm, a small section of the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass is enough to make the opponent's Eternal Body reach the Perfection Realm.

It can be said that there is nothing on Ye Tian's body that can compare to the value of the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass, not even the Void True Liquid.

Even the Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse saw this Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass, and he was afraid that he would be extremely excited.

"Hahaha, it seems that there are other resources here besides that golden tree, even if you can't get to the location of that golden tree, you can get these resources!"

Wow!

The clone condensed and immediately returned to the outside world with this Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass.

He didn't want to fall here and leave the resources unsent.

The doppelganger was very fast, and soon left here, and after leaving the Sea of Silence, he quickly shuttled back to the Dark Forbidden Realm, and then sent the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass to the main body.

The clone then proceeded to the Sea of Silence.

Soon after, Ye Tian found some resources, maybe not as good as the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass, but it was not too bad, and the clone became a porter.

Soon after.

The changes in the Sea of Silence still attracted the attention of the other half-step Eternal Realms.
